antipattern.symptom: Self-correction loop always converges on iteration 1; eval still shows hallucinations.
antipattern.root-cause: Verifier == generator: the verifier rubber-stamps its sibling's output.
antipattern.fix: Route verifier to a different model. If only one model available, use different temperature (0.0 verifier, 0.7 generator) + explicit prompt: "You are a third-party auditor. Find ALL ungrounded claims."

antipattern.symptom: Cost overrun + on-call paged after `max_corrections` reached but no audit trace exists.
antipattern.root-cause: Loop hit cap; result returned to user; trace not logged.
antipattern.fix: On cap: return `needs_human_review=true`; write full trace (each iteration's answer + verifier verdict) to audit log; surface alert.

antipattern.symptom: Eval shows answers with 4-5 hallucinated claims still surfaced.
antipattern.fix: Cap max_ungrounded_claims at 2. Tighter threshold raises regeneration rate but cuts hallucinations in shipped answers.
